description_for_human: Generate free printable PDFs — puzzles, templates, and kids worksheets — optimized for reMarkable and other e-ink tablets.
description_for_model: Remarkable Skills generates printable PDFs for e-ink tablets (reMarkable 2, Paper Pro, Supernote, BOOX, Kindle Scribe) and standard paper. Categories: puzzle games (sudoku, crossword, maze, word search, nonogram, cryptogram, kakuro, kenken, word ladder, number fill, logic puzzle, word scramble), 49+ planning/productivity/wellness templates, and kids educational worksheets (math, tracing, spelling, sight words, cursive, coloring). All generation is free and browser-side. See /llms.txt for a full structured index.
